headline.OpenStack: manual proof slice still healthy, but bulk auto-expansion currently reintroduces shortcut-heavy alerts
headline.HDFS: transfer line improved materially: hdfs_20 is now a strict-contract shortlist, while storage and pipeline replacement remain the remaining blockers
headline.Hadoop: ground-truth-filtered retrieval has been removed; cleanup and shuffle stay usable, but strict bulk sweeps show control-link still collapses at the subtype action level

openstack_v5_highnoise_strict.note: OpenStack now matches the thesis vision: baseline is not sandbagged, rag helps, and graph closes the hardest disambiguation gap.

hdfs_action_mix_diagnostic_v2.note: HDFS is not globally broken: the reference-bank cleanup restored a non-pathological rag baseline, but one shortcut-heavy pipeline slot and the whole storage line remain unfit for formal admission.

hadoop_worker_retry_probe_v1.note: A worker-RPC retry anchor on 1445087491445_0002 is locally healthy: alert-only is unsolved, rag closes only RCA, and graph closes the action.

hadoop_control_link_direct_v2.note: The control-link case preserves RCA/E2E separation but still does not support a thesis-grade remediation action.

hdfs_transfer_only_sweep_v5.note: The stricter transfer-only sweep confirms that HDFS is salvageable at the transfer family: hdfs_20 is a real shortlist-quality case, hdfs_21 is unstable, and the old benchmark transfer case remains only provisional because all methods flatten on E2E.

case_verdicts.rq3_test_set_enriched:hdfs_20: strict-contract shortlist; agent closes E2E while heuristic and alert-only stay at zero
case_verdicts.rq3_test_set_enriched:hdfs_21: reject; one reanchor becomes vanilla-solvable and the other stays flat
case_verdicts.benchmark_v2:hdfs_blk_blk_-3102267849859: provisional; valid transfer case but all llm methods flatten on E2E

transfer_only_sweep_v5.note: This run is the clearest HDFS progress so far: the dataset no longer looks globally broken, but most of the recovered value sits in one transfer action line rather than in a balanced multi-family formal mix.

case_verdicts.rq3_test_set_enriched:hdfs_37: replace; open-alert-only already solves it and rag is unstable
case_verdicts.benchmark_v2:hdfs_blk_blk_-3544583377289: storage diagnostic only; invalidSet is too weak and delete-line is too direct

action_mix_diagnostic_v2.note: The HDFS problem is now a slot-mix problem, not a dataset-wide collapse. The rag baseline is no longer pathological; the remaining blocker is to replace the shortcut-heavy pipeline slot and find a genuinely thesis-grade non-direct storage or third-family slot.

capacity_direct_anchor_probe_v3.note: The rebuilt sanitizer fixes the task definition, but the direct allocateBlock anchor is now shortcut-heavy and not safe for formal admission.

weak_anchor_probe_v1.final_verdict: reject hdfs_23, hdfs_24, hdfs_5, and hdfs_6 as storage-slot candidates
weak_anchor_probe_v1.note: Under strict high-noise probing, these weak anchors do not recover the intended storage family under any method and instead drift toward pipeline or transfer interpretations.

invalidset_rereplicate_probe_v1.note: The invalidSet redesign line preserves RCA/E2E separation but still does not yield a stable metadata-repair action under the current HDFS taxonomy and reference bank.

storage_action_redesign_probes_v1.verdict: reject this incident as a formal storage slot
storage_action_redesign_probes_v1.note: The invalidSet anchor is too weak under both candidate storage actions, while the local delete-block line is too direct and becomes heuristic-solvable at high noise.

isolate_receiver_probe_v1.verdict: reject terminating PacketResponder or ReplicaStage-closing anchors as a formal isolate-receiver slot
isolate_receiver_probe_v1.note: These anchors are not shortcut-heavy, but they are too weak: heuristics reach only pipeline-family RCA, and all open-text methods drift into transfer or benign-operation interpretations.

case_verdicts.rq3_test_set_enriched:hdfs_11: reject; open-text drifts to transfer semantics and agent still misses the action
case_verdicts.rq3_test_set_enriched:hdfs_12: best current replacement candidate; open-text stays hard while rag and agent both recover the intended pipeline repair
case_verdicts.rq3_test_set_enriched:hdfs_42: reject; isolate-receiver wording makes the alert too easy
case_verdicts.rq3_test_set_enriched:hdfs_45: reserve candidate; agent closes the action but rag still misses
case_verdicts.rq3_test_set_enriched:hdfs_46: best current replacement candidate; open-text stays hard while rag and agent both recover the intended pipeline repair

pipeline_candidate_sweep_v1.note: The new received-block sweep shrinks the HDFS problem further: hdfs_12 and hdfs_46 are clearly stronger than hdfs_37, but all received-block anchors are still heuristic-direct and therefore remain provisional until the shortcut standard is rechecked.

retrieval_contract_correction_v1.note: The earlier rebuild retrieval path is no longer considered thesis-valid because historical references were filtered and scored with gt_action_id / gt_family_id. Contract v1 now disables ground-truth reference filtering and scoring, while retaining gt_action only as an offline leak guard for known shortcut-heavy HDFS references.

worker_retry_probe_v1.note: A retry-to-worker endpoint anchor is much healthier than the old forced-close slot. This is the first locally convincing worker-RPC action line.

worker_rpc_direct_v2.note: The worker-side socket-reader anchor preserves RCA/E2E separation but still fails to recover a usable remediation action.

rm_retry_probe_v1.note: This direct RM retry result is now superseded by the gt-free reanchor line and should not be used as the main Hadoop control-link evidence.

rm_reanchor_gtfree_v2.note: Under fair retrieval, the weaker RM exception anchor is much healthier: alert-only and vanilla stop at control-link RCA, while rag and agent recover the RM-channel action.

control_probe_v5_gtfree_graphfull.note: The fair-retrieval control probe now exposes the real Hadoop blocker: current graph evidence still does not disambiguate worker-RPC vs RM-channel. Both rag and agent preserve family-level control-link RCA, but they still fail to recover the correct subtype action.

formal_candidate_sweep_v4.note: Under fair retrieval, shuffle-pressure cases are the cleanest automatically surfaced Hadoop wins, cleanup stays mostly flat, and the control-link subtypes still fail.

worker_rpc_bulk_v5.note: The stricter worker-RPC weak-anchor sweep fails across all five cases: graph can often recover only family-level control-link RCA, but never the worker-RPC action. This confirms that automatic expansion of Hadoop control-link is not ready.

bulk_candidate_sweep_v2.note: The manual OpenStack proof slice remains healthy, but automatic expansion is not yet safe: instance-sync and spawned-success alerts are still too shortcut-heavy under the strict rubric, while the image-chain and termination candidates drift into unrelated families.

code_fixes_landed.change: Canonicalize legacy Hadoop action aliases in the reference bank so control-link retrieval is no longer starved by stale action IDs.
Use selected_alert and reference primary signals, rather than full context snippets, when building graph evidence.
Add a rebuild-local sanitizer for HDFS_RETRY_ALLOCATION_AFTER_CAPACITY_CHECK so high-noise alerts do not mutate allocateBlock into benign reserveReplicaTargets semantics.
Reanchor or drop HDFS supplemental historical references that still exposed direct serving, allocateBlock, or blockMap-updated answer-card signals.

next_focus: Keep the fair retrieval contract fixed and stop using any benchmark package built before gt-filtered reference retrieval was removed.

Use hdfs_20 as the new transfer-line anchor and continue rebuilding HDFS around it; the remaining HDFS question is no longer whether transfer is salvageable, but how to recover one non-direct pipeline slot and one non-direct third-family slot.
Stop bulk-expanding OpenStack until the direct-alert filter is tightened for instance-sync and spawned-success patterns; keep using the manual proof slice as the trusted OpenStack reference path.

Rebuild the Hadoop control-link line again, either by swapping in a worker-RPC case with richer same-window evidence or by changing the graph representation beyond the current RQ2 edge-summary payload, because both formal and strict worker-RPC bulk sweeps still leave control-link subtype disambiguation below thesis grade.
